name: Geoffrey
answer1:
A great warrior
is a valiant
warrior!
answer2:
I desire to
fight again in
battle!
question:
Art thou
valiant!
yes:
Perhaps I could
someday join
thee!

name: Lord Robert
answer1:
Thou must battle
long and hard
to be a warrior.
answer2:
Battles are few
and too many!
question:
Are you a
valiant warrior?
yes:
Thou dost
deserve the
rune, ask
Nostro!

name: Lady Donna
health:
Fine, all but
the lump in
my stomach.
answer1:
It's no fun
to be pregnant.
question:
Why, art thou
the father?
yes:
Wait till I
tell my husband!

name: Bengrod
answer2:
Therein use the
stones found in
the connecting
dungeons!
question:
Hast thou found
its altar room?
yes:
It connects with
Covetous, Shame
and Hythloth!

name: Sir William
answer1:
Kill not
non-evil
creatures but
still always
stand thy
ground!
answer2:
Let them flee
instead.
never
flee uninjured!
question:
Art thou
valiant?
yes:
Strive ye to
defeat all evil!

name: Sir Hrothgar
answer1:
The valiant soul
fears not its
own visage!
answer2:
The mantra need
be known, ask
Aesop!
question:
Art thou the
most valiant of
souls?
no:
Thou should seek
the shrine of
valor!

name: a guard
job:
We guard the
gates and these
passages!
question: A

name: Aesop
answer1:
I find that 'tis
easy to be brave
from a safe
distance!
answer2:
The mantra of
valor is 'RA'
use it in the
shrine on the
next isle!
question:
Know what
I mean?

name: Gravnor
answer2:
It is found on
an altar!
question:
Dost thou
have it?
yes:
No wonder I
can't find it!
no:
It lies in the
dungeon Destard!

name: Senora
job:
I am locked up
in this tower.
answer1:
I am being
punished for my
crimes.
answer2:
Does not matter,
I can help thee!
question:
Dost thou have
a ship?
yes:
Then thou dost
need a sextant
ask the barkeep
for he knows
more!

name: Nostro
job:
I built these
passages and
they walled
me in!
answer1:
This passage
runs around the
city!
answer2:
The rune is
buried in a
tower!
question:
Wilt thou lead
me out?
no:
Thou art a cad!
and I will still
follow!

name: Luke
look:
A ranger with a
far away look.
answer1:
I come from
Skara Brae and
am on my way to
Yew.
answer2:
'tis a city
based in the
virtue of
justice!
question:
Hast thou been
to Skara Brae?

name: Max
answer2:
That's a strange
one at the
end. People
often disappear.
question:
Is there some
problem with thy
room?
yes:
I am very sorry
I will correct
it right away!

name: X
answer2:
Red is for valor
a virtue of the
avatar!
question:
Art thou an
avatar?
no:
Then thou shalt
need the red
stone in one
altar room to
get the third
part of a key!

name: Slithe
answer1:
True valor is
seen not in the
force of arms,
but in the force
of will!
answer2:
I display my
valor in battle.
question:
Art thou
valiant?
yes:
Then never flee
unless the need
is dire!

name: Timrod
answer1:
There is no
holier spot of
ground than
where defeated
valor lies.
answer2:
Be brave for
there is much
to dare!
question: Art thou brave?
